title: rubus coriaceus
intro: Rubus coriaceus, also known as the bristly blackberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus coriaceus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus coriaceus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its fruits are edible and rich in vitamins and minerals.
